What We Build

Enterprise Solutions
Built for Scale

We craft SaaS products and platforms that power businesses from Salem across India and beyond.

Most Popular

Enterprise ERP

End-to-end ERP that unifies inventory, HR, finance and operations for total business control.

Cloud SaaS Platform

Multi-tenant cloud platforms with auto-scaling, real-time sync and 99.9% uptime SLA.

Smart CRM

AI-driven lead scoring, pipeline automation and predictive sales analytics.

New

AI & Automation

Intelligent process automation, ML pipelines and AI integrations that eliminate manual work.

Security & Compliance

ISO-ready frameworks, audit trails, RBAC and data sovereignty for regulated industries.

Custom Web Platforms

Full-stack SaaS portals, marketplaces and enterprise dashboards with real-time capabilities.

Our Story

Built with Excellence,
Serving the World

Safzzo was born from a simple belief: enterprise-grade software shouldn't require enterprise-sized budgets. Based in Salem, Tamil Nadu, we build SaaS platforms that give growing Indian businesses the same technological edge as Fortune 500 companies.

Our team of engineers, designers, and domain experts craft solutions that scale with your ambitions — from a local manufacturer in Salem to a pan-India distribution network.

23
2023
Founded in Salem
Started with a vision to build world-class SaaS from Tamil Nadu
24
2024
First Enterprise Client
Onboarded our first ₹30L+ MS enterprise customer
25
2025
Series A Ready
Reached 20 clients and launched our flagship ERP platform
26
2026
50+ Clients
Serving enterprises across Salem, Chennai, Bengaluru & beyond

Mission

Make enterprise software accessible to every ambitious Indian business, regardless of size.

Values

Quality, reliability, and long-term partnership over short-term transactions.

Vision

Become India's most trusted B2B SaaS company, built from Tamil Nadu.

Client Voices

Best Businesses

Empowering businesses across every time zone. Safzzo provides the tools for global growth and local excellence.

“Safzzo transformed our operations in under a month. Their ERP replaced 5 disconnected tools and team productivity jumped 40%. The Salem team was phenomenal.”

RK
Rajesh Kumar
CEO, TamilTech Industries
Coimbatore, TN

“As a local Salem business, choosing Safzzo was an easy decision. Their SaaS platform gave us enterprise features at a price that made sense. We scaled 3× in 6 months.”
